name: Backup dan Restore
description: Backup konfigurasi, memori, dan riwayat percakapan OpenClaw, mendukung migrasi ke perangkat baru

content.body:
## Apa yang Di-backup

| Item | Path | Pentingnya |
|------|------|----------|
| Konfigurasi | `~/.clawdeckx/config.yaml` | Wajib |
| Konfigurasi agen | `~/.clawdeckx/agents/` | Wajib |
| File memori | `~/.clawdeckx/memory/` | Penting |
| Riwayat sesi | `~/.clawdeckx/sessions/` | Opsional |
| Kredensial | `~/.clawdeckx/credentials/` | Penting |

## Metode Backup

### Metode 1: Manual
```bash
cp -r ~/.clawdeckx ~/clawdeckx-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d)
```

### Metode 2: CLI
```bash
openclaw config export > backup.yaml
```

### Metode 3: Antarmuka ClawDeckX
«Ekspor Konfigurasi» di bagian bawah Pusat Pengaturan.

## Restore

1. Instal OpenClaw
2. Salin file ke `~/.clawdeckx/`
3. Mulai gateway
steps: Untuk restore, salin ke ~/.clawdeckx/ dan restart
